agent.tips.default.01: `/` to open the slash-command menu and access quick agent actions.
agent.tips.default.02: <keybinding> to toggle natural language detection and switch between agent and terminal input.
agent.tips.default.03: `/plan` <prompt> to create a plan for the agent before executing.
agent.tips.default.04: <keybinding> to open the Command Palette and access Warp actions and shortcuts.
agent.tips.default.05: Store reusable workflows, notebooks, and prompts in your
agent.tips.default.06: Enter a new prompt to redirect the agent while it's running.
agent.tips.default.07: `@` to add context from files, blocks, or Warp Drive objects to your prompt.
agent.tips.default.08: <keybinding> to attach the prior command output as agent context.
agent.tips.default.09: `/init` to index the repo so the agent can understand your codebase.
agent.tips.default.10: Add agent profiles to customize permissions and models per session.
agent.tips.default.11: Right-click a block to fork the conversation from that point.
agent.tips.default.12: Right-click a block to copy a conversation's output.
agent.tips.default.13: Drag an image into the pane to attach it as agent context.
agent.tips.default.14: Prompt the agent to control interactive tools like node, python, postgres, gdb, or vim.
agent.tips.default.15: <keybinding> to open the code review panel and review the agent's changes.
agent.tips.default.16: `/add-mcp` to add an MCP server to your workspace.
agent.tips.default.17: `/open-mcp-servers` to view and share MCP servers with your team.
agent.tips.default.18: `/create-environment` to turn a repo into a remote docker environment an agent can run in.
agent.tips.default.19: `/add-prompt` to create a reusable prompt for repeatable workflows.
agent.tips.default.20: `/add-rule` to create a global agent rule.
agent.tips.default.21: `/fork` to create a fresh copy of the current conversation, optionally with a new prompt.
agent.tips.default.22: `/open-code-review` to open the code review panel and inspect agent-generated diffs.
agent.tips.default.23: `/new` to start a new agent conversation with clean context.
agent.tips.default.24: `/compact` to summarize the current conversation and free up space in the context window.
agent.tips.default.25: `/usage` to show your current AI credits usage.
agent.tips.default.26: Use the `oz` command to run an Oz agent in headless mode, useful for remote machines.
agent.tips.default.27: Right-click selected text to attach it as agent context.
agent.tips.default.28: Use `AGENTS.md` or `CLAUDE.md` to apply project-scoped rules.
agent.tips.default.29: Paste a URL to attach that webpage as context for the agent.
agent.tips.default.30: Warpify a remote SSH session to enable Oz inside that environment.
agent.tips.default.31: Switch agent profiles to quickly change models and agent permissions.
agent.tips.default.32: `/init` to generate a `WARP.md` file and define project rules for the agent.
agent.tips.default.33: <keybinding> to auto-approve the agent's commands and diffs for the rest of the session.
agent.tips.default.34: Type `&` or use the handoff chip to move a local conversation to the cloud.
agent.tips.default.35: Enable desktop notifications to get an alert when an agent needs your attention.
agent.tips.default.36: <keybinding> to cancel the current agent task.
agent.tips.voice: Hold <keybinding> to speak your prompt directly to the agent.
